title: The Battle for Suq al-Khimis / so How Abu Ahmad and His Troops Occupied Tahitha and How al-Jubbi'i Was Killed
description: The Battle for Suq al-Khimis / so How Abu Ahmad and His Troops Occupied Tahitha and How al-Jubbi'i Was Killed. Recorded under the year 266 AH (880–881 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 37.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 37
